title: glandularia selloi
intro: Glandularia selloi, also known as Verbena selloi, is a species of flowering plant in the family Verbenaceae, native to the Andean region in South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an antispasmodic agent, with its roots and leaves containing essential oils and flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Glandularia selloi include relief from stomach cramps, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal problems, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used to make herbal extracts or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in modern medicine.
